mapper.sql:
WITH PARAM AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN #{monthOrDay} = '20' THEN 'DAY' ELSE 'MON' END AS GRP_UNIT, CASE WHEN #{fromDate} IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(#{fromDate}) > 0 AND #{fromDate} NOT IN ('null', 'undefined') THEN CASE WHEN #{monthOrDay} = '20' THEN TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{fromDate}, '-',''),'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TRUNC(TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{fromDate}, '-',''),'YYYYMMDD'), 'MM') END END AS FR_DT, CASE WHEN #{toDate} IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(#{toDate}) > 0 AND #{toDate} NOT IN ('null', 'undefined') THEN CASE WHEN #{monthOrDay} = '20' THEN TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{toDate}, '-',''),'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TRUNC(TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{toDate}, '-',''),'YYYYMMDD'), 'MM') END END AS TO_DT ), BASE AS ( SELECT B.WORK_DT, B.CTKEY, B.OWKEY, B.SKU_TYPE, B.EXP_QTY, B.ASRT_QTY, B.UNIT_COST, P.GRP_UNIT FROM ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_DATE(SUBSTR(IH.IBEXPCTDATE,1,8),'YYYYMMDD'))::DATE AS WORK_DT, CASE WHEN ID.UPRIBDTKEY IS NULL THEN 'P' ELSE 'C' END AS SKU_TYPE, ID.CTKEY, ID.OWKEY, IH.IBEXPCTDATE, COALESCE(ID.EXPCTQTY, 0) AS EXP_QTY, COALESCE(ID.ASRTWKQTY, 0) AS ASRT_QTY, COALESCE(ID.CPAMT, 0) AS UNIT_COST FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD IH JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_DT ID ON IH.CTKEY = ID.CTKEY AND IH.IBHDKEY = ID.IBHDKEY WHERE ID.ASRTWKTGTYN = 'Y' AND COALESCE(ID.IBQTY, 0) > 0 ) B JOIN PARAM P ON 1=1 WHERE B.IBEXPCTDATE IS NOT NULL AND (P.FR_DT IS NULL OR (CASE WHEN P.GRP_UNIT = 'MON' THEN TRUNC(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.IBEXPCTDATE,1,8),'YYYYMMDD'),'MM') ELSE TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.IBEXPCTDATE,1,8),'YYYYMMDD')END) >= P.FR_DT) AND (P.TO_DT IS NULL OR (CASE WHEN P.GRP_UNIT = 'MON' THEN TRUNC(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.IBEXPCTDATE,1,8),'YYYYMMDD'),'MM') ELSE TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.IBEXPCTDATE,1,8),'YYYYMMDD')END) <= P.TO_DT) ), AGG AS ( SELECT GRP_UNIT, CASE WHEN GRP_UNIT = 'DAY' THEN WORK_DT ELSE TRUNC(WORK_DT,'MM') END AS GRP_DT, CTKEY, OWKEY, SUM(CASE WHEN SKU_TYPE='P' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IB_PLAN_P_SKU, SUM(CASE WHEN SKU_TYPE='C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IB_PLAN_C_SKU, SUM(EXP_QTY) AS IB_PLAN_EA, SUM(EXP_QTY * UNIT_COST) AS IB_PLAN_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN SKU_TYPE='P' AND ASRT_QTY>0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ASRT_P_SKU, SUM(CASE WHEN SKU_TYPE='C' AND ASRT_QTY>0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ASRT_C_SKU, SUM(CASE WHEN SKU_TYPE='P' AND ASRT_QTY = EXP_QTY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ASRT_P_CMPL_SKU, SUM(CASE WHEN SKU_TYPE='C' AND ASRT_QTY = EXP_QTY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ASRT_C_CMPL_SKU, SUM(ASRT_QTY) AS ASRT_EA, SUM(ASRT_QTY * UNIT_COST) AS ASRT_AMT FROM BASE GROUP BY GRP_UNIT, CASE WHEN GRP_UNIT='DAY' THEN WORK_DT ELSE TRUNC(WORK_DT,'MM') END, CTKEY, OWKEY ) SELECT TO_CHAR(GRP_DT,'YYYY') AS grpyear, TO_CHAR(GRP_DT,'MM') AS grpmonth, CASE WHEN GRP_UNIT='DAY' THEN TO_CHAR(GRP_DT,'DD') ELSE '-' END AS grpdate, IB_PLAN_P_SKU AS ibhexptmosku, IB_PLAN_C_SKU AS ibhexptjasku, IB_PLAN_EA AS ibhexptea, IB_PLAN_AMT AS ibhexptmt, ASRT_P_SKU AS asrtmosku, ASRT_C_SKU AS asrtjasku, ASRT_EA AS asrtea, ASRT_AMT AS asrtamt, GREATEST(COALESCE(IB_PLAN_P_SKU - ASRT_P_CMPL_SKU, 0), 0) AS wkresmosku, GREATEST(COALESCE(IB_PLAN_C_SKU - ASRT_C_CMPL_SKU, 0), 0) AS wkresjasku, GREATEST(COALESCE(IB_PLAN_EA - ASRT_EA, 0), 0) AS wkresea, GREATEST(COALESCE(IB_PLAN_AMT - ASRT_AMT, 0), 0) AS wkresamt, CASE WHEN IB_PLAN_P_SKU = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(ASRT_P_CMPL_SKU / IB_PLAN_P_SKU * 100, 2) END AS progressmosku, CASE WHEN IB_PLAN_C_SKU = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(ASRT_C_CMPL_SKU / IB_PLAN_C_SKU * 100, 2) END AS progressjasku, CASE WHEN IB_PLAN_EA = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(ASRT_EA / IB_PLAN_EA * 100, 2) END AS progressea, CASE WHEN IB_PLAN_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(ASRT_AMT / IB_PLAN_AMT * 100, 2) END AS progressamt FROM AGG WHERE 1 = 1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
